VALERIAN WAS ORDERED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #818 (301/PHA)

DECLARATION OF YUAN XU IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, AND/OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES FILED BY PLAINTIFF XU, YUAN ZHANG, DE LI ZHANG, YUN LONG A MINOR, BY YUAN XU, HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM RAN, LIU HAO A MINOR, BY YONG HONG XU, HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM XU, YONG HONG

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KIMMY CHUNG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES- MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS HAVE PRESENTED NO ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT DEFENDANTS CONSPIRED TO COMMIT WRONGFUL ACTS AGAINST PLAINTIFFS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2, 3, 4, 5 AND 6 BECAUSE THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE PLAINTIFF'S TENANCY IN LIGHT OF INFERENCES THAT MAY BE DRAWN CONCERNING DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE AND ACQUIESCENCE. GRANT AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 8 AND 9 AGAINST ALL PLAINTIFFS OTHER THAN YUN HONG XU BECAUSE ONLY SHE PAID SECURITY DEPOSIT. GRANT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7 BECAUSE DEFENDANT IS NOT CULPABLE FOR HER SISTER'S ALLEGED RETALIATORY EVICTIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KIMMY CHUNG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES- MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS HAVE PRESENTED NO ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT DEFENDANTS CONSPIRED TO COMMIT WRONGFUL ACTS AGAINST PLAINTIFFS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2, 3, 4, 5 AND 6 BECAUSE THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE PLAINTIFF'S TENANCY IN LIGHT OF INFERENCES THAT MAY BE DRAWN CONCERNING DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE AND ACQUIESCENCE. GRANT AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 8 AND 9 AGAINST ALL PLAINTIFFS OTHER THAN YUN HONG XU BECAUSE ONLY SHE PAID SECURITY DEPOSIT. GRANT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7 BECAUSE DEFENDANT IS NOT CULPABLE FOR HER SISTER'S ALLEGED RETALIATORY EVICTIONS. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/BD
